betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Tiered Storage: Storage Drawers§f

§aDitch messy chests and organize your bulk materials with accessible, visual storage!§f

The §9Storage Drawers§f mod provides a highly modular, visual storage system. Instead of opening a GUI, drawers display their stored item on their front face, allowing you to insert and extract resources instantly with simple clicks.

§6Controls & Clicks§f:
§b• Insert 1 Stack§f: §9Right-click§f the front face.
§b• Insert All Matching§f: §9Double-Right-click§f the front face to dump all matching items from your inventory.
§b• Extract 1 Item§f: §9Left-click§f the front face.
§b• Extract 1 Stack§f: §9Shift + Left-click§f the front face.

§6Drawer Options & Capacities§f:
§b• 1×1 Full Drawer§f: Stores 1 item type up to §e32 stacks§f.
§b• 1×2 Full Drawer§f: Stores 2 item types up to §e16 stacks§f each.
§b• 2×2 Full Drawer§f: Stores 4 item types up to §e8 stacks§f each.
§b• Compacting Drawer§f: A smart utility. Storing compressing materials (like iron, redstone, or clay) automatically compresses/decompresses them, letting you extract them as §bBlocks§f, §bIngots§f, or §bNuggets§f simultaneously. Stores §e16 stacks§f.
§b• Safe Breakage§f: Breaking a drawer §aretains all of its stored items inside§f! You can freely move fully loaded drawers without spilling items onto the ground.

§6Framing Table & Aesthetics§f:
§eTo make your storage match your base design§f, craft a §bFraming Table§f. Place a §bFramed Drawer§f or §bFramed Trim§f inside, and add structural blocks (for the body), trim blocks (for edges), and face blocks (for slot faces) to craft completely custom-styled drawers.
§cNote§f: The decoration blocks used in the Framing Table §care consumed§f during the styling process!

§eTip§f: Start by crafting a Basic Drawer to organize your early resources — even a single 1×1 Full Drawer holding 32 stacks of cobblestone saves an enormous amount of chest space.
